chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 1184, 1185, 1186, 1187, 1188, 1189, 1190, 1191 & 1192 of 2008 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 01.02.2023. Mr. Bashir Ahmed and Atif Awan, advocates for respondents *************** None present on behalf of the applicant nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing, whereas, matters pertain to the year 2008 and cannot be kept pending. In view of such position, all these reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application (s). Office is directed to place copy of this order in connected matters. J U D G E J U D G E Amjad/PA
